# LevelUP Sports & Athletics Club

> Premier indoor multi-sport facility at 701 E Pulaski Hwy, Elkton, MD 21921. Six sports under one roof: baseball, cricket, badminton, pickleball, volleyball, and soccer. Youth academies, court/cage rentals, and expert coaching for all ages. Open 7 days a week. Phone: (443) 406-6494. Website: https://levelupsports.us

LevelUP Sports is located at the crossroads of Maryland, Delaware, and Pennsylvania — 15 minutes from Middletown, DE, 20 from Newark, DE, and 30 from Wilmington, DE. Right off I-95 exit 109A. Free parking on-site.

## Location & Hours

- Address: 701 E Pulaski Hwy, Elkton, MD 21921
- Phone: (443) 406-6494
- Email: info@levelupsports.us
- Hours: Mon–Sat 6:00 AM – 11:00 PM, Sun 6:00 AM – 9:00 PM
- Open 362 days/year (closed Thanksgiving, Christmas, New Year's Day)

## Sports & Facilities

- Baseball: 4 indoor batting cages with pitching machines up to 90 MPH. Helmets and bats provided.
- Cricket: Full-length nets with professional bowling machines. BRSS Cricket Academy partner (North America's largest). Coaching by IPL veterans and international cricketers.
- Badminton: 3 BWF-standard competition-grade courts with professional coaching. BWF Level-1 certified coaches.
- Pickleball: 2 dedicated indoor courts. Open play, lessons, and rentals.
- Volleyball: Regulation courts with adjustable nets. Youth academy, adult leagues, open play.
- Soccer: Professional indoor turf for futsal and 5v5.
- Kids Agility: Structured athletic training for ages 5–12 building coordination, speed, and confidence.

## Pricing

- Open Play: $15/hour (non-members), $8/hour (members — 50% off)
- Batting Cage Rental: $40/hour
- Badminton Court Rental: $40/hour
- Cricket Net Rental: $40/hour (single cage), $90/hour (half pitch), $180/hour (full pitch)
- Volleyball Court Rental: $120/hour
- Core Membership: $59.99/month (1 sport, 8 Open Play sessions)
- Momentum Membership: $89.99/month (all sports, 16 Open Play sessions)
- Elite Membership: $129.99/month (unlimited access, 24 Open Play sessions)
- Free first session available for all sports — no credit card required

## Academies

- Baseball Academy: Ages 8–18, three tiers (Foundations, Development, Advanced). Head Coach: Joe Vanaskey (former pro player & scout).
- Cricket Academy (BRSS Partner): Ages 8–adult. Coaches include IPL veteran Sarbjeet Ladda and international cricketers. Professional pathway to MLC/MiLC.
- Badminton Academy: Ages 7–adult. Head Coach: Nabeel Adeel (BWF & USA Badminton Level-1 certified, PA State Champion, Swarthmore College Varsity Head Coach).
- Kids Agility: Ages 5–12. Builds coordination, speed, and confidence through structured athletic training.
- Volleyball Academy: Youth and adult programs with Coach Viktor (Ukrainian First League medalist, 20+ years experience).
- Soccer Academy: Year-round indoor training on professional turf.

## Birthday Parties

- Level 1: $199 — 1 hour play + 30 min celebration, up to 10 kids, 2 pizzas + drinks, $115 in return gift coupons
- Level 2: $349 — 2 hours play + 30 min celebration, up to 15 kids, 3 pizzas + drinks, $245 in return gift coupons (most popular)
- Level 3: $449 — 3 hours play + 30 min celebration, up to 20 kids, 4 pizzas + drinks, $340 in return gift coupons
- Additional kids: $10-15/kid. All equipment provided. Setup and cleanup included.
- Return gift coupons: limited time offer, valid 60 days. Each guest gets a discount coupon for a future cage/court rental.
- Also available for: corporate events, school field trips, team outings, scout troops

## Service Area

Serving the MD/DE/PA tri-state area: Elkton MD, Middletown DE (15 min), Glasgow DE (20 min), Newark DE (20 min), Bear DE (25 min), New Castle DE (25 min), Christiana DE (25 min), Hockessin DE (25 min), Wilmington DE (30 min), North East MD (10 min), Rising Sun MD (15 min), Chesapeake City MD (20 min), Havre de Grace MD (25 min), Kennett Square PA (25 min), Oxford PA (30 min).

## Booking

Book online at https://levelupsports.us/schedule or call (443) 406-6494. Walk-ins welcome subject to availability. Free trial sessions: https://levelupsports.us/free-trial
